title: Places to See Near Likabula Falls: A Cultural Day Out

excerpt: Likabula Falls is just the beginning. From Mulanje town's macadamia vendors to ancient tea estates and a Chambe Basin day hike, here's how to turn a waterfall visit into a full cultural experience in southern Malawi.
